title: ChronoChart Agent
description: Email-based agent (Inkbox) that ingests messy clinical notes and replies with a structured medication timeline, key flags, missing/unclear info, and a short summary. OpenAI extracts strict JSON; thread-level cache merges follow-up addenda so timelines stay complete (e.g. 1–5 then 1–6). Built with Cursor; demo via local scripts and live email to the agent inbox.
